allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, pnpm, yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null; ls "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 Name; ls "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 Name)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\82102\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\호진폴더\\이익분배 시뮤레이터"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" install 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\82102\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\호진폴더\\이익분배 시뮤레이터"; & "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" run build 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "c:\\Users\\82102\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\호진폴더\\이익분배 시뮤레이터"; Start-Process "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" -ArgumentList "node_modules\\.bin\\vite" -PassThru | Select-Object Id)
PowerShell(where.exe gh 2>$null; ls "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; $dir = "c:\\Users\\82102\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\호진폴더\\이익분배 시뮤레이터"; & $git -C $dir init; & $git -C $dir add .; & $git -C $dir commit -m "init: 이익 분배 시뮬레이터 초기 커밋" 2>&1)
